_comment: Training hyperparams for exp_010 GRPO v2 — DSMLP overnight Run 2. Pivoted from full-196 curriculum (Run 1 stalled: ~67% of steps had frac_reward_zero_std=1.0 due to all-clipping on Phase 1B prompts) to strict-70. See notes.md 'Run 1 post-mortem' section.

reward._note: Format reward max = 0.225. Granular scoring ensures variance even when correctness is uniform across the 4 stochastic rollouts.
